chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI. C.P No. D-3371 of 2025. Date Order with Signature(s) of the Judge (s) For orders as to non-prosecution 19.08.2025. None present for the petitioner ************* Through this Petition, the Petitioner seeks post arrest bail in FIR No.191/2025 under Section 9(i)3c Sindh CNS (Amendment) Act, 2022 registered at P.S. Pirabad, Karachi. Now the SCNS Act has been amended by the Government of Sindh and proviso for grant of bail is inserted and today learned AAG submits that the Governor, Sindh has assented on 15.08.2025 and only formal Notification is to be issued in the Gazette. Under such circumstances, the petitioner has an alternate remedy to approach the trial Court for bail, this Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS*
